name: Katish's Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Unsalted butter, cut in bits - softened
Thin slices of lemon for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together the crushed Zwieback, butter, and sugar until well combined. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, cream together the sugar and softened cream cheese until light and fluffy. Add the flour, salt, vanilla bean, and egg yolks (beaten lightly), combining well.
3. Stir in the sour cream. In a bowl, beat the egg whites until they just hold stiff peaks. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cream cheese mixture.
4. Pour the filling into the pan and use a rubber spatula to stir the filling in a circular motion about one inch from the rim to help the cake rise evenly.
5. Bake the cake in the center of a preheated 350°F oven for 60 minutes. Turn off the oven and let the cake stand in the oven for 30 minutes.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely or until set, then remove it from the pan and place on a rack. Chill the cake covered overnight.
7. Garnish with lemon slices before serving.
